# oneAPI Level Zero headers

This folder contains headers implementing oneAPI Level Zero API v1.11.8
* oneAPI Level Zero Loader [v1.19.2](https://github.com/oneapi-src/level-zero/tree/v1.19.2/include)
* Intel GPU extensions [24.52.32224.5](https://github.com/intel/compute-runtime/tree/24.52.32224.5/level_zero/)
